use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in dashboards and admin panels
Showing avatars in comment sections, chat interfaces, or social feeds
Representing users in team management and collaboration tools
Profile image display in account settings and user directories
Avatar representation in notification badges and activity feeds
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible avatar component built on Radix UI primitives for displaying user profile images. Features automatic fallback to a muted background when images fail to load, with rounded-full styling and shrink/overflow handling. Purely presentational with no built-in interactions, making it ideal as a foundational building block for user identification across SaaS, e-commerce, and social platforms.
